untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news announcement contradicts prior regime belief' — this is a semantic/fundamental event trigger not expressible via technical indicators alone. The underreaction threshold (40% of normal expected move) requires access to baseline volatility expectations and fundamental news events which are outside the scope of the provided technical indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the underreaction component using body_pct < 40% as a proxy for muted price action. Exit targets approximate 90-100% reversion via returns thresholds (~4.5% as middle estimate). However, the core signal depends on event detection (news contradicting regime) which cannot be constructed from price/volume/technical indicators. Manual event detection or fundamental data feed required for proper implementation.
